query_string: ("marine heatwave" OR "ocean heat wave" OR "ocean heatwave") AND ("ocean current" OR "ocean circulation" OR "Gulf Stream" OR "AMOC") AND (HAS_FT:Y)
notes: PDF re-download 2026-07-16 (system date). Europe PMC pdf=render returns 404 for most OA papers; publisher OA/Free PDFs saved where available.
